test_sufficiency_summary: The rerun tactical and GUI suites now cover the corrected same-hex mixed-size seeker selection path and the seeker detonation/report machinery, so the prior tie-break gap is closed.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: DesignNotes and UsersGuide describe the seeker detonation flow, highest-max-HP same-hex target selection, normal ICM interception, seeker-specific damage summary labeling, and summary-before-cleanup ordering.

validation_commands_run.command: git diff --check master...HEAD -- include/tactical/FTacticalCombatReport.h include/tactical/FTacticalGame.h src/tactical/FTacticalGame.cpp include/tactical/FBattleScreen.h src/tactical/FBattleScreen.cpp src/weapons/FSeekerMissileLauncher.cpp tests/tactical/FTacticalSeekerMovementTest.* tests/tactical/FTacticalMineDamageFlowTest.* tests/tactical/FTacticalCombatReportTest.* tests/tactical/FTacticalBattleScreenDelegationTest.cpp doc/DesignNotes.md doc/UsersGuide.md doc/rules/tactical_operations_manual.md
